By default, the service port matches the: By default, the service port matches the target port. Enable this to use a different port for the service.

Creates a LoadBalancer to expose the app: Creates a LoadBalancer to expose the application to the internet.
By default, probes use HTTP GET on the r: By default, probes use HTTP GET on the root path with sensible defaults. Enable this to customize probe settings.
Kubernetes restarts the container if thi: Kubernetes restarts the container if this check fails repeatedly.
Kubernetes won't send traffic to the pod: Kubernetes won't send traffic to the pod until this check passes.
Kubernetes temporarily disables liveness: Kubernetes temporarily disables liveness/readiness until startup succeeds.
The minimum amount of CPU guaranteed to: The minimum amount of CPU guaranteed to the container. Kubernetes will schedule the pod on a node with at least this much CPU available.
The maximum amount of CPU the container: 容器可使用的 CPU 數上限。如果超過此限制，將會節流容器。
The minimum amount of memory guaranteed: The minimum amount of memory guaranteed to the container. Kubernetes will schedule the pod on a node with at least this much memory available.
The maximum amount of memory the contain: 容器可以使用的記憶體數上限。如果超過，將會終止容器 (OOMKilled)。
HPA scales pods based on CPU utilization: HPA 根據 CPU 使用率來縮放 Pod。
The target average CPU utilization perce: The target average CPU utilization percentage across all pods. HPA will scale up when CPU usage exceeds this value and scale down when it's below.
Ensure min ≤ max replicas and target CPU: Ensure min ≤ max replicas and target CPU between 10% and 95%.
Configure security context settings for: Configure security context settings for the container.
Ensures the container runs as a non-root: Ensures the container runs as a non-root user for better security.
Mounts the container's root filesystem a: 將容器的根檔案系統裝載為唯讀，以防止寫入作業。
Controls whether a process can gain more: Controls whether a process can gain more privileges than its parent process.
Prefer scheduling pods on different node: 偏好在不同節點上排程 Pod，以改進可用性容錯。
Distributes pods evenly across nodes to: 將 Pod 平均散發至多個節點，以改進工作負載散發。
